"[4] ALSO INFO FOR THE LOG; GRAND AVE OFR GOES UNDERNEATH THE I-5, THERE IS A LIGHT POLE ON THE LHS OF THE OFR ITSELF, BUT NOT ONE OF THE I-5 OVER THE OFR "
"[1] PART OF THE BRIDGE COMING DOWN 15-20 FT FELL INTO THE LANE/ LIGHT POLE IS ALSO DOWN / IT CAME FROM THE OVERPASS ABOVE"

"[1] SMALL WHI CHIHUAHA WALKING "APPEARS NEGLECTED" ON RHS"

"[1] [1] WHI SEMI ON LEFT SHOULDER WILL ADV ON CHP[Shared]"
"[4] HODLING DWNBOUND LNS SR18 JSO SR138"

"[5] 123-CZP2 SB 15 6TH TO THE 10 #3-4 LNS // ALSO 4TH ST ONR TO SB AS WELL AS TRANS SB 15 TO EB 10"
"[4] 123-CZP3 #3-4 NB 15 4TH TO JSO FOOTHILL CLOSED TIL APPROX 0500 "

"[1] WHI CADI SD VS GRY SD "

Log.Location: "SR74 E EO / San Jacinto Av - SR79"

details.IncidentDetail: "[6] [Notification] [FSP]-139-506 FSP REQ A BREAK TO START SB 5 AT CAMINO CAP - VEH HAS 6 PTYS WHO ARE DISABLED ONE W/WHEELCHAIR - REQ CHP HOLD ALL LANES WHILE FSP PUSHES THE VEH TO RS [Shared]"
